tasks.instruction: Open WeChat and send the message 'Anything is fine' to the group chat 'ZhouLei'
rubrics: Search for the group chat 'ZhouLei' and open it
Type and send the message 'Anything is fine'
human_reference_operations: Search for the group chat 'ZhouLei' by swip

tasks.instruction: Open WeChat and like a post under a randomly selected friend's Moments post
rubrics: Tap 'Moments' to enter the Moments feed
Find a post and tap the comment icon (two dots) to open the like/comment menu
Tap the 'Like' button (heart icon) to like the post
human_reference_operations: Tap 'Moments' to enter the Moments feed
Find a post and tap the comment icon (two dots) to open the like/comment menu
Tap the 'Like' button (heart icon) to like the post

tasks.instruction: Post a WeChat Moment by selecting a photo related to food from the phone gallery, and include a description of at least 20 characters
rubrics: Tap 'Moments' to enter the Moments feed
tap the camera icon to start posting a new Moment
select 'From Album' to choose a photo from the gallery
randomly select a photo from the gallery
tap the '完成' (Done) button to confirm the selection
enter a description of at least 20 characters in the text field
human_reference_operations: Tap 'Moments' to enter the Moments feed
tap the camera icon to start posting a new Moment
select 'From Album' to choose a photo from the gallery
randomly select a photo from the gallery
tap the '完成' (Done) button to confirm the selection
enter a description of at least 20 characters in the text field
